geographic_restrictions: Must be authorized to work in the United States; onsite presence in North Bethesda, MD required at least six days a month.
project_area: Biomedical research, science education and training, and other programs at FNIH
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; emphasis on diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility in leadership and team building.
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations, individual donors, corporate foundations, charitable foundations, and pharma/biotech companies. Candidates must have 10-15 years of fundraising experience, ideally in biomedical research or healthcare, and a track record of raising major gifts ($1M+). Must be authorized to work in the U.S. and willing to travel.
